rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: PlugX DLL Search Order Hijacking Using Avast wsc_proxy (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: PlugX DLL Search Order Hijacking Using Avast wsc_proxy (RedCanary Threat Detection
  Report)
id: c518ac74-2e2b-4197-84d7-ea5118c557eb
status: experimental
description: "Detects possible DLL Search Order hijacking using Avast antivirus wsc_proxy\
  \ application. \nThis technique is associated with PlugX. Part of the RedCanary\
  \ 2023 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/raspberry-robin/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.s0013
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \wsc_proxy.exe
  filter:
    Image|contains: \program files\
  condition: selection and not filter
falsepositives:
- Could be the result of an administrator installing the application in a custom path
level: low
